creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matthias Fechner from comment #3)
> You saw, that this patch is for port net-mgmt/monitoring-plugins and the
> duplicate you mentioned is port net-mgmt/nagios-plugins?
> 
> So this is not a duplicate, two different ports.
> 
> I opened it again.

Ah, sorry, the silliness of having two different sets of nagios plugins always bites me.
